name: @jeswr/kernel-e8-scale
description: E8 extension 2 kernel-side prep: encode the 1,054-concept E4 vocabulary at D=8192 (pinned kot-enc-B/1) and project through the fixed JL streams (projected path, Common rule 3). Emits raw float32 RDM binaries + meta for poc/e8/build_inputs.py --scale.

scripts.kernel-rdm-scale: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/kernelRdmScale.js
